programmes.show_description: The female CEO of a popular wellness company says she was raped, but her business partner claims the accusation is part of an embezzlement cover-up
Rollins' sister stirs up trouble and a possible SVU investigation when she reports a doctor who trades prescription painkillers for sex.
Dylan and Lizzie investigate when a street artist's work is found with a victim's body in the middle of it. Ryan catches a suspect in the Sleeping Beauty Killer investigation.
A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels.
When the son of Frank's most outspoken critic is murdered, Frank and the boy's father must put aside their differences to seek justice.
When Eddie and Jamie become overly involved in a complicated adoption case between the birth and adoptive parents, they ask Erin to help them settle the dispute without going to court.
Danny Regan is moonlighting as a private security for an ex convict who wants to see his son. Jamie and Eddie have to break up an arguement on the street between two partners.
When diplomatic immunity complicates a child abuse case for Danny and Baez, Frank intervenes, despite not having jurisdiction on the case.
Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a gang leader where the accused shooter is an ex-con romantically linked to his parole officer.
When the team investigates the death of a sailor involved in illegal street-racing, it emerges that the man had classified Navy equipment on him.
The investigation into a marine's death throws up the possibility of links between the military and local gangs.
The murder of a marine triggers an investigation in which Sam has to go undercover as a fighter at a mixed martial arts gym.
The murder of a naval officer entangled in the world of Hollywood prompts Hetty to request that an LAPD officer helps the investigation.
A video link provides the team with a much-needed lead in their investigation of Dom's kidnapping.
When the covert transfer of a terrorist in army custody is compromised, the team must locate the suspect before he flees the country.
Callen's cover is blown and he's forced to sever his ties with NCIS in order to protect the team's safety.
Dylan and Lizzie go undercover in New York's erotic underworld when they investigate the murder of a high-powered public relations rep.
The squad comes together for Detective Stabler to find the suspect behind a threat to his family.
The squad must face an angry neighbourhood watch group when a girl disappears near a building that houses sex offenders
An ingénue ballerina discovers she's been secretly videotaped for a pornographic website.
Garland is forced to put friendships to one side after a pastor at his church is arrested
Detectives Logan and Barek handle the case of a woman's body that fell out of an aeroplane wheel well into the sea.
When a radio magnate's son is murdered, suspicion points to his stepmother.
Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The lover of a model who helped Jessica research a book is targeted by a killer in Paris, and Jessica is faced with a slave labour scandal.
The townspeople in Cabot Cove are concerned about a massive land development project on the shore. Jessica's nephew Grady is among the first employed by the company.
A vicious battle takes place for the role of headmaster in a local prep school where Jessica is to give a lecture.
Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a man who killed a mother and son years ago while driving drunk; Anthony is torn when Erin asks him to wear a wire to incriminate a friend.
Linda's brother gets in trouble with the mob and asks Danny to keep him safe.
Jamie and Eddie suspect foul play when the husband of a dying woman doesn't respond to her 911 call.
An ex-NYPD officer goes missing after telling Danny of her plans to make amends to the woman she and her partner wrongfully convicted.
Erin's ex-husband represents the person she's trying to convict of murder.
A judge is shot dead by a sniper while participating in a duel. Goren and Eames suspect a politician's scandal-ridden husband may be responsible.
Logan and Wheeler must overcome a conspiracy of silence to find the killer of a famous rapper.
The wife of a preacher is found dead backstage at a public debate, and Goren and Eames wonder whether her husband has something to hide.
A journalist is poisoned with a fatal dose of radiation and evidence emerges to suggest that he was not the intended target.
Logan and Wheeler's investigation into the death of a womanising doctor exposes his son's relationship with a teacher.
A renowned activist believes a hate group has kidnapped her sister; Garland and Benson seek change with NYPD brass; Kat receives some good news.
Benson encounters a hostage situation at a neighbourhood restaurant; Rollins attempts to help her father who has been hospitalised.
The SVU struggles to find a serial predator who uses a date rape drug that leaves no evidence behind; Rollins receives some good news
